underlying_goal: Integrate Brevo SMTP provider for forgot-password emails and future booking reminder emails in the Travel Planner app
friction_detail: Initial design referenced legacy sib_api_v3_sdk package instead of correct brevo_python import, requiring mid-implementation correction.
brief_summary: User wanted to integrate Brevo email for forgot-password flow; design and planning completed successfully, implementation was progressing well but session ended due to auth token expiration before full completion.
